unit.scope: Client vitest 1331/1331 (122 files). Server vitest 1314/1314 also green at F0 full-suite. Change is client-only (DiagnosticsPage.tsx, TriagePage.tsx) so no new unit tests authored; existing suites guard against regression.

e2e.scope: Playwright (4 specs / 8 tests) against an isolated worktree stack (Hono :3856 + Vite :5184, SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local, isolated USERPROFILE). New: diagnostics-launchers-removed (Launchers section absent; Claude CLI + Sessions present) and triage-header-restyle (full-bleed white 24px/700 h1 + count badge + bottom border; no subtitle). Regression: triage-restyle (3) + triage-tab (3) still green. 8 passed.

design_fidelity.scope: Triage header computed styles asserted in real Chromium: fontSize 24px, fontWeight >=700, bar background rgb(255,255,255) (--color-surface), non-zero bottom border. Matches the Inbox/Projects header geometry.

smoke.scope: Client-only page-chrome change; no server / API / dev-server change. Stack booted only to drive the F0.5 E2E.

surface_verification.justification: UI change to the Diagnostics + Triage pages; surface=web drove the real UI entry point against a live stack (safety-enforced at small + UI). Evidence: .shipwright/runs/iterate-2026-05-30-page-chrome-cleanup/surface_verification.json.
